description_long: This is a rectangular hardcover book with a dark, textured cover and a minimalist design. The front cover features three wavy turquoise lines, suggestive of water or movement, set against a black background. The book's spine and edges display alternating black and white horizontal stripes, giving it a modern, graphic appearance. The title 'How To Swim' is printed in turquoise on the front cover, using a bold, sans-serif font. The book appears to be of average thickness, with visible white pages sandwiched between the covers. There are no visible illustrations or publisher logos on the cover or spine.
description: A black hardcover book with turquoise wavy lines and the title 'How To Swim' on the front, featuring striped black and white edges.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the black cover with three turquoise wavy lines and the striped black and white page edges.
description_view_1: Viewed from the short edge, the turquoise wavy lines are visible on the cover, and the striped page edges are prominent.
description_view_2: The front cover is visible, displaying the three turquoise wavy lines and the title 'How To Swim' in turquoise text.
description_view_3: The opposite short edge is shown, with the turquoise wavy lines on the cover and the striped page edges visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with horizontal black and white stripes and no visible text or decorative elements. The design is simple and modern.
